headline: Symetra Promotes Nicholas Mocciolo to Chief Investment Officer of Symetra Financial Corporation
summary: BELLEVUE, Wash., April 29, 2026--Nicholas Mocciolo has been promoted to chief investment officer, Symetra Financial Corporation.
